testcase.name: shouldThrowResourceNotFoundWhenOrderDoesNotExist

testcase.name: shouldAddProductToOrderSuccessfully
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-06 07:20:04.354 [main] INFO c.t.o.service.OrderService - Added 3x Laptop to order ORD-001 2026-04-06 07:20:04.355 [main] DEBUG c.t.o.service.OrderService - Remaining stock for PROD-001: 7
